prepared_text:
August 03, 2023  
 
National Stock Exchange of India Limited 
Exchange Plaza 
Bandra Kurla Complex (BKC) 
Bandra (east) 
Mumbai – 400051 
 
BSE Limited 
Phiroze Jeejeeboy Towers 
Dalal Street 
Mumbai – 400001 
Symbol: EQUITASBNK 
Scrip Code No.: 543243 
 
Dear Sir/Madam 
Sub: Intimation under Regulations 30 and 46(2) (oa) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and 
Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Transcript of Earnings call held on July 31, 2023 
 
In furtherance to our letter dated July 20, 2023, inter-alia, intimating the earnings call of our Bank 
with Investors and Analysts and pursuant to the Regulations 30 and 46(2) (oa) of SEBI (Listing 
Obligations and Disclosure Requirements), Regulations 2015, we would like to inform that the 
transcript of the earnings call has been made available at the website of the Bank and the link for 
the same is given below:  
 
https://ir.equitasbank.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/Earnings-Call-Transcript-Q1FY24-
Equitas-Small-Finance-Bank.pdf 
Kindly take the above information on record. 
Thanking you, 
Yours faithfully, 
For Equitas Small Finance Bank Limited 
 
 
N Ramanathan 
Company Secretary 
 
 
NATARAJAN 
RAMANATH
AN
Digitally signed by NATARAJAN 
RAMANATHAN
